chain.thought: Explanation: By checking the season premiere months, Seasons 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 7 premiered in March or October, while Season 6 premiered on September 6, 2010. Therefore, Season 6 is the only one that premiered in September.

judge_thought: Explanation: Reviewing the season premiere dates, all seasons premiered in March or October except Season 6, which premiered on September 6, 2010. Thus, Season 6 is the only one to premiere in September.
